name: io.github.Agnuxo1/enigmagent-mcp
description: Local encrypted vault MCP server. {{PLACEHOLDER}} secrets resolved at runtime, LLMs never see keys.

runtimeArguments.name: --vault
runtimeArguments.description: Absolute path to the encrypted vault file

environmentVariables.name: ENIGMAGENT_USER
environmentVariables.description: Username for headless / CI mode (skips interactive prompt)

environmentVariables.name: ENIGMAGENT_PASS
environmentVariables.description: Master password for headless / CI mode (skips interactive prompt). Use only in trusted environments.
